ogTitle: Kingaham vs Kings Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kingaham and Kings Beach.
heading: Kingaham vs Kings Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingaham, Queensland and Kings Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kings Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kingaham (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingaham or Kings Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingaham has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Kings Beach scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingaham scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Kings Beach scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingaham or Kings Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kings Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
